prompt:
A site-evaluation worksheet showing horizon segments, brightness gradients, and a few glare-source arrows sketched across the page. A dim observing light, clipboard, and outdoor field gear nearby make it clearly a dark-sky assessment record.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft low light, realistic paper and pencil textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the page centered and uncluttered.
